title: taraxacum starmuehleri
intro: Taraxacum starmuehleri, commonly known as a type of dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family and is native to certain regions. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum starmuehleri include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum starmuehleri can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and it is often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and other health conditions.
